name: Catalog Homepage
notes: Razor Page. PageModel: IndexModel.
Auth: public.
Loads data via ICatalogViewModelService.GetCatalogItems(pageId, ITEMS_PER_PAGE, BrandFilterApplied, TypesFilterApplied).
Query params: BrandFilterApplied, TypesFilterApplied, pageId.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 page component at /; Angular CatalogService fetches data via HttpClient from Spring @RestController @GetMapping("/api/catalog"); ICatalogViewModelService becomes Spring @Service bean

name: Brand and Type Filter Form
notes: GET form. Submits to same page route (/).
Fields: BrandFilterApplied (select, integer ID from CatalogIndexViewModel.Brands), TypesFilterApplied (select, integer ID from CatalogIndexViewModel.Types).
Brand and type lists preloaded by OnGet via ICatalogViewModelService.
No server-side validation — all values are integer IDs from preloaded lists.
javaEquivalent: Angular reactive form (FormGroup); on submit calls Angular CatalogService GET /api/catalog?brandId=&typeId= via HttpClient; Spring @RestController @GetMapping returns filtered catalog items

name: Catalog Product Grid
notes: Renders one product tile per CatalogItem via _product.cshtml partial in a @foreach loop.
Conditional: shown only when CatalogModel.CatalogItems is non-empty.
Empty-state message: 'THERE ARE NO RESULTS THAT MATCH YOUR SEARCH'.
Paginated — items per page bounded by Constants.ITEMS_PER_PAGE.
_pagination partial rendered both above (line 27) and below (line 37) the product tile grid.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 component with @for over catalogItems array from Angular service response; empty-state block via @if; each tile rendered by child ProductComponent receiving item as @Input()

name: Pagination Controls
notes: Partial view rendered from Index.cshtml:27 (above grid) and Index.cshtml:37 (below grid).
Displays: Previous link, summary text 'Showing {ItemsPerPage} of {TotalItems} products - Page {ActualPage+1} - {TotalPages}', Next link.
Model: PaginationInfoViewModel (ItemsPerPage, TotalItems, ActualPage, TotalPages, Previous, Next).
Previous and Next links pass updated pageId via asp-all-route-data; all other current query params (filters) are preserved.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 PaginationComponent receiving PaginationInfoViewModel as @Input(); Previous/Next trigger page change; Spring @RestController returns Spring Data Page<T> with totalElements and totalPages metadata

name: Product Tile
notes: Partial view rendered from Index.cshtml:33 once per CatalogItem in the @foreach loop.
Displays: product image (PictureUri), product name (Name), price (Price formatted as N2).
Model: CatalogItemViewModel (Id, Name, PictureUri, Price).
Entire tile is wrapped in a single POST form targeting /Basket/Index.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 ProductComponent receiving CatalogItemViewModel as @Input(); displays image, name, price and contains the Add to Basket form

name: Add to Basket Form
notes: POST form. Submits to /Basket/Index (Basket Index page OnPost handler).
Fields posted: id (hidden, CatalogItemViewModel.Id), name (hidden), pictureUri (hidden), price (hidden).
No client-side or server-side validation.
On success: /Basket/Index OnPost handler controls redirect target.
javaEquivalent: Angular reactive form; on submit calls Angular BasketService HTTP POST to Spring @RestController @PostMapping("/api/basket"); basket item DTO carries id, name, pictureUri, price in request body

name: Apply Filters Button
notes: Image-type submit input (arrow-right.svg icon).
Submits GET form with BrandFilterApplied and TypesFilterApplied as query params.
Reloads the page with filtered catalog results; pageId resets to default (0).
javaEquivalent: Angular (ngSubmit) on filter form calls Angular CatalogService GET /api/catalog?brandId=&typeId=; component re-renders catalogItems from response

name: Previous Page Link
notes: Navigates to same route with pageId set to ActualPage - 1.
Preserves existing BrandFilterApplied and TypesFilterApplied query params via asp-all-route-data.
Model.Previous CSS class is applied to the anchor — used to visually disable the link when on the first page.
javaEquivalent: Angular (click) calls Angular CatalogService GET /api/catalog?page={currentPage-1}&brandId=&typeId=; Angular Router updates URL with queryParamsHandling: 'merge'

name: Next Page Link
notes: Navigates to same route with pageId set to ActualPage + 1.
Preserves existing BrandFilterApplied and TypesFilterApplied query params via asp-all-route-data.
Model.Next CSS class is applied to the anchor — used to visually disable the link when on the last page.
javaEquivalent: Angular (click) calls Angular CatalogService GET /api/catalog?page={currentPage+1}&brandId=&typeId=; Angular Router updates URL with queryParamsHandling: 'merge'

name: Add to Basket Button
notes: Submit input with value '[ ADD TO BASKET ]'.
POSTs id, name, pictureUri, and price hidden fields to /Basket/Index OnPost handler.
One button instance per product tile; each is scoped to its own form.
javaEquivalent: Angular (ngSubmit) calls Angular BasketService HTTP POST to Spring @RestController @PostMapping("/api/basket"); on success Angular Router navigates to /basket
